candidates.title: Europe Breakout Retest Scalp
candidates.thesis: Trade the first clean Europe-session expansion after structure confirms, keeping cost and momentum alignment explicit. Corpus anchor: SRC-001: The entry price is deﬁ ned as the price at which a trade is triggered. The proﬁ t target is deﬁ ned as the price where the trade exits with a proﬁ t. The stop loss is deﬁ ned as the price where the trade exits with a loss.

candidates.title: Trend Pullback Continuation Scalp
candidates.thesis: Trade shallow Europe-session pullbacks only when the broader intraday move still points in the original direction. Corpus anchor: SRC-003: Price action - weakness The clue is in the name! Just as stopping volume was stopping the market from falling further, so topping out volume is the market topping out after a bullish run higher. candidates.title: Mean Reversion Exhaustion Scalp
candidates.thesis: Fade short-lived exhaustion only after a stretched move begins to reverse back through the short-term mean. Corpus anchor: SRC-004: The longer a market consolidates in a narrow range, then the more dramatic the resulting price action once the market moves away from this region.
